semantic_description: Verifies binary_search_last over a sorted integer array. The function performs a while-loop binary search for the first index whose value is greater than target, then returns the previous index when it contains target, otherwise returns -1. The result must be the last occurrence of target when present, or indicate absence when target is not in the array. The input array memory is read-only and preserved through IntArray::full; edge cases include n == 0, no loop iterations after convergence, and left == 0 before the final left - 1 access.
